name: Diabetic Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine raisins, dates, and water in a pot. Boil for 3 minutes.
2. Add shortening to the mixture and let it cool.
3. In a separate bowl, beat eggs.
4. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (flour, sweetener, soda) to the egg mixture and mix well.
5. Chill the dough.
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 10 to 12 minutes.
